message:
test(tls): add TLS conformance and security integration tests

Comprehensive TLS test suite (bd-31p8) covering:
- Handshake state machine transitions (connect, accept, error paths)
- Certificate validation (self-signed, chain construction, expiry)
- ALPN negotiation (happy path, mismatch, fallback behavior)
- Session resumption configuration
- Mutual TLS (mTLS) / client authentication
- TlsError type coverage and Display/source trait implementations
- Security properties (invalid DNS names, protocol version enforcement,
  certificate pin sets with SPKI pinning)

Uses embedded self-signed test certificates for localhost. Tests are
gated behind the "tls" feature flag. Includes a test_helpers macro
module for common assertions and setup patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
